nasb.text: For the commandment is a lamp and the teaching is light; And reproofs for discipline are the way of life

esv.text: For the commandment is a lamp and the teaching a light, and the reproofs of discipline are the way of life,

cnv.text: 因為誡命是燈，訓誨是光， 出於管教的責備是生命之道，

ccb.text: 因为诫命是灯，训言是光， 管教责备是生命之道，

csbs.text: 因为诫命是灯，法则是光， 出于管教的责备是生命的道路，
